title: Notifications stay inside their own workspace
description: If you belong to more than one company, your notifications no longer cross over. You only see a company's notifications — and its bell count — while you're working in that company; switch companies to see the other's. 'Mark all as read' only clears the workspace you're in. You still get an email either way so you know to switch over.

title: Multi-company members are now assignable on tasks & campaigns
description: If you invited someone who already has their own HQue account (or belongs to another company), they could see your workspace and appeared under Settings → Team — but they were missing from the 'assign to' list on tasks and campaigns. Fixed: assignment now uses your real team membership, so any actual member is assignable no matter which workspace they're currently working in.

title: Rename the "Brands/Clients" section to fit your team
description: Not every team thinks in "brands and clients." You can now choose what that section is called — Departments, Categories, Teams, Projects, or your own word — when you sign up, or anytime in Settings → Agency Info. Your choice shows up everywhere that word appears, across your whole workspace. Every other team is unaffected.

title: Search and filter the Product Updates page
description: As this list grows, you can now search it (by title and description) and filter by type — Features, Improvements, or Fixes — alongside the status tabs, so you can quickly find whether something's been built. Every item keeps its date.

title: Permanently delete archived brands & clients
description: You can now permanently delete a brand or client — but only from the Archive, and only after typing its exact name to confirm, so nothing is ever deleted by accident. It removes the brand and its boards, tasks, contacts, and notes. Campaigns are kept (moved to unassigned) so their history isn't lost. Owner/admin only.

title: Duplicate brand & client protection (including archived)
description: When you add a brand or client, HQue now checks your whole list — active and archived — as you type, ignoring case, punctuation, and small spelling differences. If a match already exists (even an archived one), it shows it with a one-click Open or Restore, so you don't end up with duplicates. Genuinely different brand that just sounds similar? You can still 'Add anyway.'

title: Time-stamped comments that lock after 5 minutes
description: Every task comment is time-stamped (and marked 'edited' if it was changed). You can edit or delete your own comment for 5 minutes after posting; after that it becomes a permanent record. You can never edit or delete someone else's comment — enforced in the app and the database.

title: Retain draft text on the comment section, even if the tasks closes
description: If you're partway through writing a task comment and close the task (or navigate away, or refresh the page), your unsent text is now saved and waiting for you when you reopen the task. It clears automatically once you post the comment.

title: Paste Screenshots as an attachment while writing on the comment section
description: You can now paste a screenshot (or any image) straight from your clipboard into a task comment and it attaches automatically — no need to save the file first and pick it from the file browser. Drag-and-drop still works too.

title: Custom Type and Niche Talent Labels
description: Your talent Types and Niches are no longer a fixed list. On Pro and Business, make them your own in Settings → Talent Labels: rename a label (it updates on every talent already tagged), add the categories your agency actually works in, remove the ones you don't use, and drag to reorder. Your roster filters and the Add-Talent form both use your own list, and every talent keeps the tags they already have.

title: One login, many companies — switch between them instantly
description: Your email can now belong to more than one company. When another agency or brand invites you to their HQue, their company appears in a switcher at the top of the app — click to swap your whole workspace to it, and switch back just as fast, all without signing out. You can also create additional companies you own from the same menu, each with its own trial, team, and billing. If you only belong to one company, nothing changes.

title: Invitations now send a branded email
description: When you invite a teammate, they get an on-brand HQue email that says who invited them and to which company, with a one-click Accept invitation button that signs them straight in — whether they're new to HQue or already have an account.

title: Light mode now looks right everywhere
description: Creator and Campaign detail panels used to open in the opposite theme to the rest of the app, so in light mode you'd get a black panel over a white page. Parts of them stayed dark regardless of your theme — the talent payment editor and the outreach log were unreadable in light mode, and hovering a campaign row left it stuck black. Everything now follows the theme you've picked.

title: Cancel your plan or close your account, from inside HQue
description: Settings → Billing now has a Danger zone. Cancel my plan stops the billing at the end of the period you've paid for and keeps all your data — with a Resume button if you change your mind. Close this account locks the workspace and cancels billing straight away, but nothing is deleted for 30 days: until then the owner can restore everything with one click. Both are owner-only.

title: Option to hide Workspace Band list on mobile view
description: On a phone, the brand/client list used to sit in a fixed column next to your board, leaving the board squeezed into a sliver. The workspace now drills down instead: the brand list fills the screen, you tap a brand, and the board gets the whole screen — with a Brands button to go back. Desktop is unchanged.

title: Add definitions of roles
description: Settings → Team now explains what Owner, Admin, and Member each can do, so you know exactly what you're handing someone before you invite them.

title: Only the account owner can change or cancel your plan
description: Billing is now owner-only. Admins can still run the workspace — invite people, change roles, edit agency info — but they can no longer change your plan, update the card, or cancel the account. Anyone else who lands on the trial-ended or payment-failed screen is simply told which owner to ask.

title: Marketing pages now open correctly
description: Fixed an issue where clicking Pricing, The Pitch, Privacy, or Terms could send you back to the home page instead of opening the page. Every public link now goes straight to the right page.

title: hque now shows up on Google, AI search, and shared links
description: Our public pages — homepage, pricing, FAQ, blog, and every blog post — are now fully readable by Google, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants, with unique titles, descriptions, and a branded preview image when you share a link. Your logged-in workspace stays private and out of search.

title: Compare plans at a glance
description: The pricing page now has a full feature-by-feature comparison table across Starter, Pro, and Business, so you can see exactly what each plan includes before you choose.

title: Branded login page for your agency
description: Your agency now has its own sign-in page at h-que.com/your-workspace — showing your own logo instead of HQue. Find and copy your link in Settings → Agency Info.

title: White-label your workspace (Business plan)
description: On the Business plan, your own logo replaces HQue across your workspace once you're signed in. Upload your logo in Settings → Agency Info.

title: Add your logo when you subscribe
description: When you start a paid plan, you're prompted to upload your agency logo so your branding is ready from day one.
